_comment: Phase 4 baseline: v0.4 SDK defaults restored explicitly. Phase 6 changes flipped these in v0.5; here we override BACK to the paper-Table-2 / pre-tuning values so we can compare head-to-head against v0.5 on the same LoCoMo conv0 + same production flags. Note: core_session_threshold isn't here because the benchmarks adapter pins cst=2 regardless of SDK default — so cst doesn't change between v0.4 and v0.5 in this comparison.
